_comment: PHASE 2 overlay, not yet wired into the metrics. A versioned, ADD-ONLY set of field-specific constructs and methods that OpenAlex topics are too coarse to capture (e.g. 'Multilingual Education and Policy' lumps SLA, bilingual education, and policy together). Rules when activated: never rename or delete a tag, only add; stamp this version into every snapshot. That keeps year-over-year comparable, which a freely-drifting keyword list would not. Patterns are regular expressions matched against titles (and abstracts where licensing allows).
